data.title: BitMart LaunchPrime will list XPL (Plasma)
data.description: BitMart has officially launched its new product, LaunchPrime, providing global users with a new platform for early-stage investment in high-quality assets. The first project, XPL (Plasma), has launched. The total supply of XPL is 100,000 XPL, with a subscription limit of 500 USDT per user. As part of the platform's strategic upgrade, LaunchPrime further enhances the BitMart ecosystem. With the addition of more high-quality projects, BitMart will drive the comprehensive development of the platform ecosystem and the crypto market.

data.title: Huang Licheng's ETH and PUMP long positions saw a floating loss of over $21.77 million, and he added 4.72 million USDC in two hours.
data.description: According to Lookonchain, Machi Big Brother Huang Licheng (@machibigbrother) has incurred over $21.77 million in losses on his long positions in ETH and PUMP on Hyperliquid due to the market downturn. To avoid liquidation, he added 4.72 million USDC to the platform's margin in the past two hours.

data.title: International Commercial Settlement purchased 105.89 Bitcoins for a total of $1,200,000
data.description: International Commercial Settlement (00147.HK) announced on September 24 that its joint venture KeenGolden acquired a total of 105.88972 bitcoins on the open market for a total of US$1,200,000 (equivalent to HK$93,600,000).

data.title: GriffinAI: Removed GAIN official liquidity from BNB chain to protect users
data.description: GriffinAI announced on the X platform that it has removed the official GAIN liquidity pool on the BNB chain to protect user safety. The company also warned users not to interact with any liquidity pools created by the attacker, as these are unofficial and pose risks. The company also stated that GAIN on Ethereum was unaffected and that further updates will be released later.

data.title: Naver's stock price rose 11% at one point due to the news of the share swap with Upbit's parent company Dunamu.
data.description: According to market information, the share price of South Korean portal Naver surged as much as 11% intraday today. Earlier news reported that Naver's financial subsidiary, Naver Financial, is in the process of completing a full share swap with Dunamu, the parent company of Upbit. Upon completion, Dunamu will become a wholly-owned subsidiary of Naver, and Naver will integrate Dunamu's business, covering shopping, finance, and cryptocurrency trading.

data.title: BTC briefly fell below 112,000 USDT, with a 24-hour drop of 0.49%.
data.description: OKX market data shows that BTC briefly fell below 112,000 USDT and is currently trading at 111,989 USDT, a 24-hour drop of 0.49%. (This news flash was generated by AI)

data.title: ZEROBASE's TVL increased by over $100 million in 3 hours after its launch on Binance Wallet
data.description: ZEROBASE, a real-time ZK proof network, added over $100 million in TVL and over 20,000 new user addresses in just three hours after participating in the Binance Wallet Booster Program.

data.title: Australia plans to legislate crypto platforms to be licensed
data.description: According to the Australian Treasury, the country has published a draft amendment to the Corporations Act 2001, requiring crypto trading platforms and tokenized custody platforms to hold an Australian financial services license. The draft will include digital asset platforms (DAPs) and tokenized custody platforms (TCPs) in the new financial product category, making them subject to the full set of licensing and consumer protection rules of existing financial institutions. The Treasury noted that the framework focuses on companies that hold user assets, rather than the digital assets themselves, and the primary regulatory model will be consistent with financial intermediaries such as portfolio operators. According to the plan, the Australian Securities and Investments Commission (ASIC) will become the licensing body, and related consultations will be open until October 24, 2025. (TheBlock)

data.title: Ethereum(ETH) Drops Below 4,000 USDT with a 3.66% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Sep 25, 2025, 04:54 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Ethereum has dropped below 4,000 USDT and is now trading at 3,990.22998 USDT, with a narrowed 3.66% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: BasedOneX Launchpad project Upheavalfi completes public offering with 110 times oversubscription
data.description: BasedOneX announced that its platform Launchpad project, Upheavalfi (UPHL), has officially completed its public offering, raising $7.3 billion and achieving an oversubscription of 110 times. The official timeline indicates that UPHL will be listed for trading on HyperCore at 4:00 AM (UTC) on September 26th, after which users will be able to claim UPHL tokens. The airdrop claim window will open at 6:00 AM (UTC), allowing users to claim their tokens immediately or lock up their holdings to receive a higher multiple.

data.title: Bitcoin spot ETFs saw a total net inflow of $241 million yesterday, with BlackRock IBIT leading the way with a net inflow of $129 million.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, Bitcoin spot ETFs saw a total net inflow of $241 million yesterday (September 24th, US Eastern Time). The Blackrock IBIT ETF saw the largest single-day net inflow yesterday, with a net inflow of $129 million, bringing IBIT's total net inflow to $60.776 billion. The next largest single-day inflow was the ARKB ETF, a 21 Shares-Ark Invest ETF, with a net inflow of $37.7217 million, bringing ARKB's total net inflow to $2.184 billion. As of press time, the total net asset value of Bitcoin spot ETFs was $149.736 billion, with a net asset value ratio (market capitalization relative to the total Bitcoin market capitalization) of 6.62%, and cumulative net inflows to $57.492 billion.

data.title: Ethereum spot ETF had a total net outflow of $79.3623 million yesterday, continuing its net outflow for three consecutive days.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (September 24th, US Eastern Time), Ethereum spot ETFs saw a total net outflow of $79.3623 million. The Fidelity ETF (FETH) saw the largest daily net outflow, with a net outflow of $33.2632 million. FETH's total net inflow has now reached $2.744 billion. The second largest daily net outflow was the Blackrock ETF (ETHA), with a net outflow of $26.4682 million. ETHA's total net inflow has now reached $13.358 billion. As of press time, the Ethereum spot ETF's total net asset value (NAV) was $27.418 billion, with a 5.45% ETF net asset ratio (market capitalization as a percentage of Ethereum's total market capitalization). The ETF's cumulative net inflow has reached $13.624 billion.

data.title: Keen Golden Acquires Over 105 Bitcoins in Market Purchase
data.description: According to PANews, on September 24, International Business Settlement (00147.HK) announced that its joint venture, Keen Golden, acquired a total of 105.88972 bitcoins on the open market. The total purchase cost amounted to $1.2 million, equivalent to 93.6 million Hong Kong dollars.

data.title: OKX’s “Earn Coins through Airdrops” will list Plasma (XPL) and support OKB subscription
data.description: According to official news, the latest phase of OKX's "Airdrop to Earn Coins" will list Plasma (XPL), with a total prize pool of 8.8 million XPL. From 21:00 on September 25, 2025, to 21:00 on October 2, 2025 (UTC+8), users can subscribe using USDT, BTC, or OKB to share in the XPL rewards. Specifically, the prize pool is divided into three parts: the USDT prize pool is 2,900,000 XPL, with a minimum subscription of 100 USDT and a maximum subscription of 50,000 USDT; the BTC prize pool is 2,900,000 XPL, with a minimum subscription of 0.001 BTC and a maximum subscription of 2 BTC; and the OKB prize pool is 3,000,000 BARD, with a minimum subscription of 1 OKB and a maximum subscription of 500 OKB. The Airdrop Earn Coins program is an innovative coin-earning product that supports subscriptions with USDT or other mainstream cryptocurrencies. Users can earn returns on the base currency and receive additional airdrops of new coins. OKX reminds users that identity verification is required to participate, and this promotion is not available to sub-accounts or institutional accounts.

data.title: South Korean Media: Naver Financial Plans to Execute Full Share Swap with Upbit's Parent Company Dunamu
data.description: Naver Financial is in the process of completing a full share swap with Dunamu, Upbit's parent company. The plan is to issue new shares in exchange for Dunamu shareholders' shares, making Dunamu a wholly-owned subsidiary. Upon completion, Naver will integrate Dunamu's businesses, encompassing shopping, finance, and cryptocurrency trading. (Chosun)

data.title: Ethereum Spot ETF Sees Continued Outflows While Bitcoin ETF Gains
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, recent data from Farside Investors indicates that the U.S. Ethereum spot ETF experienced a net outflow of $79.4 million yesterday, marking the third consecutive day of outflows. Among these, BlackRock's ETHA saw a net outflow of $26.5 million, while Fidelity's FETH recorded a net outflow of $33.3 million.

In contrast, Bitcoin spot ETFs reported a net inflow of $241 million, with BlackRock's IBIT contributing $128.9 million to this figure.

data.title: Ethereum Price Movements Could Trigger Significant Liquidations
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, data from Coinglass indicates that if Ethereum's price falls below $4,000, the cumulative liquidation intensity of long positions on major centralized exchanges (CEX) could reach $451 million.

Conversely, if Ethereum surpasses $4,200, the cumulative liquidation intensity of short positions on these exchanges could amount to $1.079 billion.

BlockBeats notes that the liquidation chart does not display the exact number of contracts pending liquidation or their precise value. Instead, the chart's bars represent the relative importance of each liquidation cluster compared to nearby clusters, indicating intensity.

Therefore, the chart illustrates the potential impact on the market when the asset price reaches certain levels. A higher "liquidation bar" suggests a stronger market reaction due to liquidity waves when the price hits that point.
